stories.title: 6th Annual Southern Colorado Juneteenth Festival — Free, Family-Friendly, New Venue
stories.angle: The 6th Annual Southern Colorado Juneteenth Festival moves to a new venue — Norris Penrose Indoor Event Center (1045 Lower Gold Camp Rd) — for 2026. FREE admission for all ages. June 20-21. Kids' zone with bounce houses, face painting, and obstacle course. National headliners, local step show talent, car show, health fair, fashion show. Community celebration open to all Colorado Springs families. New venue offers more accessibility and covered space compared to prior years at America the Beautiful Park.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: 6th Annual Southern COS Juneteenth Festival: FREE June 20-21 at Norris Penrose (1045 Lower Gold Camp Rd). Kids' zone, bounce houses, face painting, national headliners. All ages welcome. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: New for 2026: the Southern Colorado Juneteenth Festival moves from America the Beautiful Park to Norris Penrose — covered, accessible, free. June 20-21. Bring the whole family. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Free, Family-Friendly Juneteenth Festival Returns to COS June 20-21 at New Venue

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
6th Annual Southern Colorado Juneteenth Festival

#### Concept 1 — Social Image (X + Facebook, 1200x675)

**Prompt:**
A vibrant outdoor festival scene at golden hour, warm sunlight filtering through a large covered indoor event venue. In the foreground, two young children — a boy and a girl, approximately ages 5-8, diverse — watching a colorful performance with wide smiles, their backs to the viewer. Festive red, black, and green decorative banners hang in the background. The crowd is joyful, multi-generational, and warmly dressed for summer. Mood: celebratory, community warmth, family joy. Lighting: warm golden afternoon light with soft shadows. Color palette: warm golds, deep greens, rich reds, sky blue accents. Art style: warm photorealistic illustration. Clean open space in the bottom third for text overlay.

---

#### Concept 2 — Article Hero (1200x675)

**Prompt:**
A family of four — two adults and two children ages 4-10 — walking into a bright, spacious indoor event center through wide open entrance doors. Late afternoon light streams in from outside. The space ahead shows vibrant festival decorations in red, black, and green. The family is seen from behind, the children slightly ahead with excitement in their body language. Mood: welcoming, communal, summer celebration. Lighting: warm natural light from the entrance, soft interior lighting. Color palette: warm amber, deep green, brick red, cream. Art style: warm realistic illustration. Clean open space in the bottom third for text overlay.

---

research.facts:
6th Annual Southern Colorado Juneteenth Festival
**Sources:** kktv.com, visitcos.com, fox21news.com, csjuneteenthfestival.com, onebodyent.org, norrispenrose.com, juneteenthevents.us
**Confirmed Facts:**
- [HIGH] 6th Annual Southern Colorado Juneteenth Festival, June 20-21, 2026 (Source: onebodyent.org, juneteenthevents.us)
- [HIGH] NEW VENUE for 2026: Norris Penrose Indoor Event Center, 1045 Lower Gold Camp Rd, Colorado Springs, CO 80905 (Source: kktv.com, fox21news.com, norrispenrose.com)
- [HIGH] FREE admission for all ages (Source: visitcos.com, csjuneteenthfestival.com — "FREE to the public")
- [HIGH] Kids' zone with bounce houses, face painting, and obstacle course (Source: juneteenthevents.us)
- [HIGH] Entertainment features national headliners V.I.C. and David Banner (Source: earlier search result summary from juneteenthevents.us)
- [HIGH] Also includes: car show, health fair, local step show talent, fashion show (Source: fox21news.com, visitcos.com)
- [HIGH] Prior venue was America the Beautiful Park; 2024 festival drew ~36,000 people (Source: kktv.com)
- [HIGH] Organized by One Body Entertainment (Source: onebodyent.org)
- [MEDIUM] Specific hours for each day not confirmed across multiple sources — hours listed as June 20 8:00 AM – June 21 8:00 PM MDT (Source: juneteenthevents.us — single source, use with note)

stories.title: Pikes Peak International Hill Climb — Fan Fest + Father's Day Race Weekend
stories.angle: The Pikes Peak International Hill Climb race week begins TOMORROW (June 16). Free public Fan Fest on June 19 (5-9 PM, downtown COS, 10 city blocks, driver meet-and-greet, stunt performances). Race Day is June 21 — Father's Day. Race Day tickets required for anyone age 10+; must be purchased online in advance (not available on Race Day). Seven spectator areas including Devil's Playground at 12,780 ft elevation. Practice/qualifying June 16-19 for spectators at designated areas.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: Pikes Peak Hill Climb race week starts TOMORROW (June 16). Free Fan Fest: June 19, 5-9 PM downtown COS (10 city blocks). Race Day: June 21 (Father's Day). Race tickets required for ages 10+. ppihc.org #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: Father's Day plan: watch the Pikes Peak Hill Climb. Free Fan Fest June 19 downtown. Race Day June 21 — tickets required online in advance (ages 10+). No in-person ticket sales. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Pikes Peak Hill Climb Race Week Starts Tomorrow — Free Fan Fest, Father's Day Race Day

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Pikes Peak International Hill Climb — Fan Fest + Race Day

#### Concept 1 — Social Image (X + Facebook, 1200x675)

**Prompt:**
A dramatic mountain road curves sharply upward through a rocky alpine landscape at high elevation, early morning light breaking over the mountain peaks. A lone race car is a small figure mid-corner on the road, suggesting speed and scale. In the foreground below, two children — ages 6 and 9 — stand on a rocky overlook with a parent, all looking up toward the mountain with wonder. Clear blue sky, fresh mountain air feeling. Mood: awe, adventure, family excitement. Lighting: crisp early morning golden light, long shadows. Color palette: slate gray rock, electric blue sky, warm amber sunrise light, forest green. Art style: cinematic photorealistic illustration. Clean open space in the bottom third for text overlay.

---

#### Concept 2 — Article Hero (1200x675)

**Prompt:**
Downtown Colorado Springs festival street scene at dusk, warm string lights overhead, 10 city blocks of festival energy visible in the distance. A family with young kids walks in the foreground, the children pointing toward bright event tents and sponsor displays ahead. Race-themed decorations visible but subtle. The mood is festive, energetic, and family-friendly. Lighting: warm twilight with string lights and venue glow, blue-purple sky. Color palette: warm gold string lights, cool twilight blue, white tent canvas, forest green. Art style: warm photorealistic illustration. Clean open space in the bottom third for text overlay.

---

research.facts:
Pikes Peak International Hill Climb — Fan Fest + Race Day
**Sources:** ppihc.org, visitcos.com, uncovercolorado.com, humanitix.com
**Confirmed Facts:**
- [HIGH] Pikes Peak International Hill Climb 2026 Race Day: Sunday, June 21 (Father's Day), green flag at 7:30 AM (Source: ppihc.org)
- [HIGH] Practice and qualifying: Tuesday-Friday, June 16-19, 2026 (Source: ppihc.org)
- [HIGH] Fan Fest: June 19, 2026, 5:00 PM - 9:00 PM, Downtown Colorado Springs, spanning 10 city blocks (Source: ppihc.org — "PPIHC Fan Fest will take place on June 19, 2026...from 5:00 p.m.–9:00 p.m. in Downtown Colorado Springs...spanning 10 city blocks")
- [HIGH] Fan Fest is FREE and open to the public (Source: ppihc.org)
- [HIGH] Fan Fest features: driver meet-and-greet, stunt performances, vendor/sponsor booths, family-friendly entertainment (Source: ppihc.org)
- [HIGH] Anyone age 10 and over needs a Race Day ticket (Source: ppihc.org — "Anyone who is 10 years of age and over needs a race ticket")
- [HIGH] Tickets NOT sold on Race Day and not sold in-person at any PPIHC event — must be purchased in advance online (Source: ppihc.org)
- [HIGH] 7 designated spectator areas (Source: ppihc.org)
- [HIGH] Devil's Playground is the highest spectator area at elevation 12,780 ft (Source: ppihc.org)
- [HIGH] Ticket prices increased after June 1 (Source: ppihc.org — "Ticket prices increase after June 1")
- [HIGH] ppihc.org is the official site for tickets (Source: ppihc.org)

stories.title: Little Grape Land Nursing Pillow Recall — CPSC June 4 Suffocation Hazard
stories.angle: CPSC recalled ~1,430 Little Grape Land nursing pillows (June 4, 2026) due to suffocation hazard — the pillow design can obstruct infant breathing. Sold on Amazon August 2025–April 2026 for ~$28-$30. No labels or markings on product. Patterns include rose floral, alligator, bear, butterfly, cactus, construction truck, forest deer, green leaves, little bunny, spring flower, and woodland animal. Stop use immediately. Cut in half, email photo to recall@evermorepartner.com for full refund. No injuries reported at time of recall.

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text: RECALL: Little Grape Land nursing pillows (CPSC June 4). ~1,430 units on Amazon, Aug 2025–Apr 2026. Suffocation hazard — can obstruct infant breathing. Stop use NOW. Full refund info at cpsc.gov. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text: If you bought a Little Grape Land nursing pillow on Amazon (Aug 2025–Apr 2026): stop using it. Cut in half, send photo to recall@evermorepartner.com for full refund. No labels on product. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: CPSC Recall: Stop Using Little Grape Land Nursing Pillows Immediately

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Little Grape Land Nursing Pillow Recall

#### Concept 1 — Social Image (X + Facebook, 1200x675)

**Prompt:**
A close-up, clean product-style image of a U-shaped nursing pillow in a neutral, well-lit setting — soft white and light gray tones. The pillow is shown on a plain light surface, slightly angled. The scene has a clinical-yet-caring feel, suggesting attention and caution. A small red alert badge shape is visible in the upper right corner of the frame (no text in badge). No baby or infant depicted. Mood: calm urgency, awareness, safety. Lighting: soft diffused studio lighting, no harsh shadows. Color palette: soft white, light gray, muted rose, with a small accent of red. Art style: clean realistic product illustration. Clean open space in the bottom third for text overlay.

---

#### Concept 2 — Article Hero (1200x675)

**Prompt:**
A concerned parent — adult, viewed from the side — reading something on their phone while seated at a kitchen table in a warm, softly lit home. A U-shaped nursing pillow sits on the table beside them, slightly out of focus in the foreground. The expression is attentive and thoughtful. The setting is calm and domestic. No infant depicted. Mood: attentive concern, domestic safety, informed parenting. Lighting: warm indoor kitchen light, soft morning feel. Color palette: warm cream, soft wood tones, muted sage green, light gray. Art style: warm photorealistic illustration. Clean open space in the bottom third for text overlay.

---

research.facts:
Little Grape Land Nursing Pillow Recall
**Sources:** cpsc.gov, foxbusiness.com, thecooldown.com, yahoo.com/news, myparistexas.com
**Confirmed Facts:**
- [HIGH] CPSC recall announced June 4, 2026 (Source: cpsc.gov official recall page)
- [HIGH] Company: Little Grape Land (contact via recall@evermorepartner.com) (Source: cpsc.gov, thecooldown.com)
- [HIGH] Approximately 1,430 units recalled (Source: cpsc.gov, foxbusiness.com)
- [HIGH] Product: U-shaped nursing pillows sold under Little Grape Land brand (Source: cpsc.gov)
- [HIGH] Sold on Amazon.com from August 2025 through April 2026 (Source: cpsc.gov, foxbusiness.com)
- [HIGH] Price: approximately $28-$30 (Source: foxbusiness.com — "prices ranging from $28 to $30")
- [HIGH] Hazard: pillow design can obstruct infant breathing, posing risk of suffocation/death (Source: cpsc.gov official recall page)
- [HIGH] No labels or markings on product (Source: cpsc.gov)
- [HIGH] Patterns: rose floral, alligator, bear, butterfly, cactus, construction truck, forest deer, green leaves, little bunny, spring flower, and woodland animal (Source: cpsc.gov)
- [HIGH] No injuries or incidents reported at time of recall (Source: cpsc.gov)
- [HIGH] Action: stop use immediately; cut in half; email photos to recall@evermorepartner.com for full refund (Source: cpsc.gov, thecooldown.com)
- [HIGH] Violates mandatory standards for nursing pillows and infant support cushions (Source: cpsc.gov)

stories.title: D49 Free Summer Meals — Final 4 Days (Ends June 19)
stories.angle: D49's free summer meals program ends Thursday, June 19 — just 4 days away. Springs Ranch Elementary (4350 Centerville Drive). All children ages 1-18, no registration, no ID, no income verification. Breakfast 7:45-8:15 AM, lunch 10:30-11:20 AM. Any child welcome regardless of school district. D11 continues free meals through July 31 at multiple COS sites (d11.org) for families who miss the D49 window.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: D49 FREE meals end THURSDAY, June 19. 4 days left. Springs Ranch Elementary, 4350 Centerville Dr. All kids ages 1-18, no sign-up. Breakfast 7:45 AM, lunch 10:30 AM. D11 runs through July 31. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: D20 June 30 Deadlines — Summer School and Bus Registration Close in 15 Days
stories.angle: Two Academy School District 20 registration deadlines close June 30 — just 15 days away. Summer school registration (credit recovery, enrichment, graduation requirements) via Infinite Campus at asd20.org/summer-school. Transportation/bus registration also ends June 30 for current students (new students: June 8-June 30); address update and fee required in Infinite Campus; bus assignments sent Aug 1. Missing these deadlines means no guaranteed spot for summer programming or bus service in fall.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: D20 families: two deadlines June 30 — summer school registration AND school bus registration. 15 days left. Log in to Infinite Campus or visit asd20.org to complete both before the cutoff. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: D20 Families: Two Registration Deadlines Close June 30 — 15 Days to Act
